Corporate Profile

About Medinet
Pharmaceutical Marketing

Established in 1998, Medinet Pharmaceutical Marketing Company has built a highly reputable position in global pharmaceutical marketing by offering premium, affordable, and bioequivalent healthcare products.

We manage therapeutic formulation delivery across intensive clinical segments including Cardiology, Neurology, Gastroenterology, Dermatology, and Respiratory sciences. By bridging manufacturing excellence with robust commercial execution, we ensure quality medicines are always within patient reach.

Scientific Integrity

We base all formulations on validated clinical trials, ensuring comparative bioequivalence matches original innovator drug standards.

Ethical Partnerships

Our manufacturing partners run state-of-the-art facilities compliant with WHO-GMP, USFDA, or EU-GMP specifications.

Quality Assurance

Batch traceability is maintained from raw API synthesis up to final dispatch, keeping product consistency uncompromised.

Pharmacovigilance

We proactively maintain safety logs and clinical feedback mechanisms to respond immediately to any drug safety queries.

25+Years of Trust
150+Therapeutic Formulations
18+Global Country Footprints
450+Dedicated Distributors
100%WHO-GMP Compliant Partners
10M+Happy Patients Served Annually
Therapeutic Segments

Comprehensive Healthcare Formulations

We develop and distribute highly effective medicines covering a broad array of therapeutic disciplines, backed by targeted formulation research.

Cardiovascular

Advanced cardioselective therapies, lipid-lowering agents, and anti-hypertensives designed to manage coronary artery disease and heart failure.

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Neurology & CNS

Specialized central nervous system modulators, neuropathic pain relievers, and neuroprotective agents targeting critical brain disorders.

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Gastroenterology

Proton pump inhibitors, prokinetics, anti-spasmodics, and gut-health solutions restoring gastrointestinal balance.

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Dermatology

Premium therapeutic topical formulations, anti-fungals, corticosteroids, and advanced skin-barrier restorative creams.

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Anti-infectives & Antibiotics

Broad-spectrum cephalosporins, macrolides, and fluoroquinolones addressing drug-resistant bacterial strains and acute infections.

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Respiratory & Pulmonology

Inhalation formulations, long-acting bronchodilators, and anti-asthmatics for chronic obstructive pulmonary diseases (COPD).

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Orthopedics & Pain Management

Highly selective COX-2 inhibitors, chondroprotective agents, and muscle relaxants restoring joint mobility and relieving chronic pain.

VIEW FORMULATIONS

Nutraceuticals & Wellness

Evidence-based micronutrient formulations, high-potency antioxidants, and bioactive vitamins for comprehensive preventative wellness.

VIEW FORMULATIONS
Product Showcase

Featured Formulations

Tablet20 mg

Medivastin 20

Atorvastatin Calcium Trihydrate IP

A highly selective, competitive inhibitor of HMG-CoA reductase, the rate-limiting enzyme that converts 3-hydroxy-3-methylglutaryl-coenzyme A to mevalonate, a precursor of cholesterol.

Key Indications:
  • •Primary hypercholesterolemia (heterozygous familial and non-familial)
  • •Mixed dyslipidemia (Fredrickson Types IIa and IIb)
Pack: 10 x 14 Tablets Alu-Alu Blister
Capsule5mg / 5mg

Cardipril AM

Ramipril IP 5mg + Amlodipine Besylate IP 5mg

A synergistic dual-mechanism anti-hypertensive agent combining a long-acting Angiotensin-Converting Enzyme (ACE) inhibitor with a calcium channel blocker for superior blood pressure control.

Key Indications:
  • •Moderate to severe essential hypertension
  • •Patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled with monotherapy
Pack: 10 x 10 Alu-Alu pack
Tablet300mg / 10mg

Gabax NT

Gabapentin 300mg + Nortriptyline Hydrochloride 10mg

Combines an alpha-2-delta ligand (Gabapentin) with a tricyclic antidepressant (Nortriptyline) to deliver intensive synergism for neuropathic pain alleviation.

Key Indications:
  • •Post-herpetic neuralgia
  • •Painful diabetic peripheral neuropathy
Pack: 10 x 10 Tablets in Alu-Alu strip
Medical Feedback

Trusted by Healthcare Professionals

Leading clinicians, institutional pharmacists, and global distributors share their experiences in partnering with Medinet Pharmaceuticals.

We have prescription records for over 2,500 cardiovascular patients on Medivastin 20. The comparative clinical response has been absolutely identical to innovator lipid regulators with excellent compliance.

Dr. Ketan Mehta, MD

Consulting Cardiologist

As a regional distributor in South India, logistical reliability and uncompromised batch records are critical. Medinet provides complete CTD dossiers and maintains perfect batch stability indices.

Ramanathan Iyer

Chief Executive

Formulating products with Gabax NT has given our neurological clinic a stellar therapeutic weapon for diabetic neuropathic pain management. Patient compliance rates are extremely high.

Dr. Sarah Al-Dossari

Head of Neurology

ConferenceJuly 02, 2026

Medinet to Showcase Advanced Therapeutic Portfolio at CPHI Global 2026

Medinet's executive delegation announces its participation in the upcoming CPHI Global Conference, showcasing newer drug delivery mechanisms in CNS and Cardiology.

NewsMay 18, 2026

Medinet Allied Manufacturing Facilities Secure WHO-GMP Recertification

Medinet's primary allied formulation facility passes comprehensive multi-day regulatory audit with zero critical observations, validating outstanding quality control benchmarks.

Read complete release
CSRApril 10, 2026

Medinet CSR: Launching Free Diagnostic and Medication Distribution Camps

Underscoring our core belief in patient care, Medinet launches rural health initiatives, providing free cardiac diagnostic checkups and life-saving anti-hypertensives.
